svg.metadata: { "shi_label": "SHI #", "stylometric_provenance": { "source": "safe-harbor.ingress.triad", "entrant_prompt_lanes": ["future_self", "past_self", "higher_self"], "threshold_rule": "40-word minimum per lane", "signature_semantics": "entrant-owned stylometric witness", "derivation_rule": "SHI is deterministically derived from principal + binding_fragment + entrant-owned stylometric fingerprint", "interpretation_note": "Treat any SHI carried with this probe-launched SVG as bound to the entrant's own stylometrics from the three ingress prompts, not as a standalone arbitrary identifier.", "stylometric_fingerprint": null, "triad_word_counts": null, "triad_shortfalls": null } }
